zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence de Hatfield於1439年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾維爾時，他的父親Stephen De Hatfield30歲，母親Isabel Russell30歲。他於大約1465年與Agnes Marshall在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾內瓦可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年在英國英格蘭越可爾易亞斯特 賀斯勒頓享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hatfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hatfield (East Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Nottinghamshire, Worcestershire, Herefordshire, Hertfordshire, Essex), or Heathfield (Sussex, Somerset), though not all of these have given rise to hereditary surnames. The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence de Hatfield was born in 1439, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen De Hatfield, was 30 and his mother, Isabel Russell, was 30. He married Agnes Marshall about 1465, in Newark, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1472, in East Heslerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence de Hatfield est né en 1439, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen De Hatfield, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Russell, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Marshall environ 1465, à Newark, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1472, à East Heslerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence de Hatfield 1439 in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen De Hatfield 30 und seine Mutter Isabel Russell 30. Er hat um 1465 in Newark, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1472 im Alter von 33 Jahren in East Heslerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence de Hatfield è nato il nel 1439 nel Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen De Hatfield, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Russell, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Marshall circa 1465, nel Newark, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1472, nel East Heslerton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Hatfieldが1439年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノーウエルで生まれた時，父Stephen De Hatfieldは30歳，母Isabel Russellは30歳であった。約1465年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアニューアルクでAgnes Marshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスト ヘスラートンで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Hatfield(이)가 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen De Hatfield(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Russell(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 뉴아르크에서 Agnes Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 헤슬레르턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence de Hatfield nasceu em 1439, em Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen De Hatfield, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Russell, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Marshall aproximadamente 1465, em Newark, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1472, em East Heslerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ro.East Heslerton, Yorkshire, England: East Heslerton, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence de Hatfield родился в 1439 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen De Hatfield было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Russell, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Marshall около 1465 г. в местности нюарк, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1472 г. в местности эаст хеслиртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
